description: Style Note woodland, a giant in the outdoor shoe industry, have come up with this rugged shoe with a refined stance. Stylish topstitching on the woodsy upper adds an aesthetic referenced from the outdoors. Crafted with hand-picked Italian leather and soles finished with German technology, your footwear closet is incomplete without a Woodland shoe. Wear this with chinos or denims and a checked casual shirt or a tee. Style this with a rugged belt. Product Details Brown and beige coloured two-tone suede upper with aggressive stitch detailing, stitches on the seams of the toe box, branding on the tongue, two-hole lace up, padded insole for in-step comfort, removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic, rubber midsole, TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, outsole reinforced onto the heel for maximum comfort Material and Care Suede, leather, TPU Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not store in direct sunlight
